name: Evan Cather - Upper East Side Golf Lessons - Randalls Island Location
about: Evan Cather Golf Instruction operates primarily as a training studio, providing golf lessons at two Manhattan locations: The Hack Shack and Randalls Island Golf Center. The Hack Shack utilizes Trackman 4 technology, the #1 simulator on the PGA Tour, with Bodi Trak Pressure Mats and video analysis for lessons. Randalls Island is described as a full-length outdoor range with grass tees, a multi-level hitting area, chipping green, and practice bunker. Lessons are available for all skill levels, from tour professionals to complete beginners, and are taught by Jim McLean Master Instructor Evan Cather. The facility focuses on providing technical instruction with data-driven feedback and personalized practice drills.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium PGA-level Trackman 4 technology for detailed swing analysis
Instruction from a Jim McLean Master Instructor with a focus on measurable improvement
Flexible indoor simulator and outdoor range options for all weather conditions

simulator_hardware.notes: PGA-level simulator technology with Bodi Trak Pressure Mat

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the most accurate lesson experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drink to either location. The focus appears to be on instruction with no mention of food service policies.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website primarily lists 1-hour lesson packages. It doesn't specifically mention the time required for an 18-hole simulator session, but standard sessions typically last 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about child-friendly features or junior programs is provided on the website. Lessons are available for 'all skill levels' but focus on adult instruction.
